title: centaurea axillaris
intro: Centaurea axillaris is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family, Asteraceae, characterized by its fragrant, blue-violet flowers and feathery foliage. The medicinal properties of Centaurea axillaris include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as rheumatism, fever, and respiratory issues. This plant is also known for its health benefits, including reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and protecting against cell damage. Centaurea axillaris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat digestive problems and promote overall well-being.
